response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with a focus on testability and diverse technologies, but lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of C++ and large-scale cloud compute leadership. His background in mentoring and open-source contributions is a positive, though his leadership experience is not explicitly tied to cloud or DevOps teams.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems, infrastructure, and developer tooling across multiple roles.
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, talks, and open-source projects.
Diverse technical background with exposure to performance-critical and real-time systems (e.g., low-latency apps in DLang).
concerns: Only limited experience with C++ (primarily at National Instruments, 2014–2015), falling short of the 8-year requirement.
No explicit evidence of technical leadership in cloud compute or DevOps teams, a preferred qualification.
Most recent roles emphasize full-stack development (TypeScript/Node.js) rather than large-scale cloud infrastructure.
